info.title: UOA BillingCreditsV1 consumer API
info.description: Exact customer-facing shared team credits API. UOA returns display-ready values and capabilities; products never calculate balances, conversion, privacy filtering, or authorization.

post.summary: Read the exact active team credit projection
post.description: The product posts the exact subject bound into X-UOA-Actor. Every active exact-team member may read remaining, pending, and current-period aggregate credits. UOA returns full-team user detail only to billing managers; ordinary members receive a privacy-safe own-plus-team-aggregate projection.

Cache-Control.description: Customer billing responses are never cacheable.

post.summary: Create Checkout for one UOA-defined credit offer
post.description: Products re-fetch the projection and relay the complete frozen action body unchanged. UOA verifies its subject against the app key and actor, then derives idempotency from the exact team, actor assertion, and offer.

200.description: A normalized HTTPS URL for UOA-hosted Stripe Checkout or recovery.

Cache-Control.description: Customer billing responses are never cacheable.

post.summary: Create Setup Checkout for one bounded automatic top-up option
post.description: Retry-safe: UOA recovers the exact open Setup Checkout using server-owned idempotency and leases.

200.description: A normalized HTTPS URL for UOA-hosted Stripe Checkout or recovery.

Cache-Control.description: Customer billing responses are never cacheable.

post.summary: Consent to one bounded UOA option using the verified payment method
post.description: Idempotently selects one immutable UOA consent revision.

204.description: The exact UOA-managed configuration was updated.

Cache-Control.description: Customer billing responses are never cacheable.

post.summary: Disable future automatic top-ups for the exact team
post.description: Idempotent; repeated calls leave automatic top-up disabled.

204.description: The exact UOA-managed configuration was updated.

Cache-Control.description: Customer billing responses are never cacheable.

post.summary: Open UOA-hosted recovery for the exact pending payment

200.description: A normalized HTTPS URL for UOA-hosted Stripe Checkout or recovery.

Cache-Control.description: Customer billing responses are never cacheable.

UoaActor.name: X-UOA-Actor
UoaActor.description: Fresh credential-bound RS256 actor assertion for the exact user/org/team.

BillingCreditsV1.title: UOA billing credits consumer contract v1
BillingCreditsV1.description: Display-ready shared team credits, fixed top-up offers, bounded automatic top-up options, and immutable entry history.

BillingCreditsV1Conformance.summary: Shared team credits with fixed conversion and bounded automatic top-up

viewer.description: This viewer may see the full team breakdown and manage funding.

conversion.description: 1,000 credits always equal US$1.00; one cent always equals 10 credits.

credit_balance.label: Remaining credits
credit_balance.description: 34,125 credits are shared by this team across connected services.

pending_credits.label: 20,000 credits pending
pending_credits.description: One top-up is awaiting verified payment and is not included in available credits.

funding_policy.title: Add team credits
funding_policy.description: Credits fund metered usage across connected services. Subscriptions and add-ons remain separate.

offers.name: 20,000 credits
offers.description: Pay US$20.00 and receive exactly 20,000 credits.

action.label: Buy 20,000 credits for US$20.00
action.description: Open secure Checkout; credits become available only after UOA verifies payment.

automatic_top_up.description: When the team balance falls below 5,000 credits, UOA may charge US$20.00 for 20,000 credits, up to US$100.00 monthly.

consent.description: Consent covers the displayed threshold, refill offer, and monthly cap.

options.label: 20,000 below 5,000; US$100 monthly cap
options.description: A bounded UOA option; products cannot submit arbitrary amounts.

setup_action.label: Set up automatic top-up
setup_action.description: Review and consent to this exact option in secure Checkout.
setup_action.disabled_reason: Automatic top-up already has a verified payment method.

update_action.label: Use this automatic top-up option
update_action.description: Select only this UOA-defined threshold, refill, and cap combination.

disable_action.label: Turn off automatic top-up
disable_action.description: Stop future automatic charges without changing available credits.

recover_action.label: Review payment
recover_action.description: Open UOA recovery when a payment requires customer action or review.
recover_action.disabled_reason: No automatic top-up currently requires recovery.

recent_entries.label: DeepWater usage
recent_entries.detail: 5,000 credits were consumed by team-rated DeepWater usage; see the user breakdown.

recent_entries.label: Team credits added from Nessie
recent_entries.detail: A verified US$20.00 payment added exactly 20,000 shared team credits.

recent_entries.label: Account credit adjustment
recent_entries.detail: 22,000 shared team credits were granted by UOA support.
